name: SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup
title: SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup
syntax: dword SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup( dword psiHandle, dword eventGroupId );
description: This function adds an Event Group to a Provided Service Instance, which was created by SomeIpCreateProvidedServiceInstance.
Objects can be added to the Event Group as follows:
An Event Group can be removed again using the SomeIpRemoveProvidedEventGroup function.

parameters.name: psiHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Provided Service Instance that was created by SomeIpCreateProvidedServiceInstance.

return: 0: An error occurred. The error can be evaluated using the SomeIpGetLastError function.
